cases.title: TS-06: Session idle beyond 8 hours rejects check-in with SessionExpired per NFR-16 default target
preconditions: Student AuthSession row exists with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before fixed TestClock
TestClock is injected and set to current time
Active workshop session exists with valid QR token and enrolled student
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session cookie and valid tokenId, latitude, and longitude
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode SessionExpired
Assert response message is Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn per error-handling §4.1
Query attendance_records and confirm no Present status created for the student
cases.expected: NFR-16 default 8-hour inactivity target met: expired session rejected with HTTP 401 SessionExpired on check-in; user must re-authenticate per AC-02c and BR-06; no attendance mutation

cases.title: AuthService enforces 8-hour sliding inactivity expiry against real Postgres auth_sessions
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
identity-auth AuthService wired to AuthSession repository per database design §5.1
Active student user exists with known credentials
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Invoke AuthService.authenticate with valid student credentials at T0
Query auth_sessions for new row with last_activity_at at T0 and expires_at reflecting 8-hour window
Advance TestClock to T0 + 8 hours and 1 minute without any authenticated activity
Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) with the session id
cases.expected: NFR-16 module boundary: AuthSession committed with 8-hour inactivity window; requireUser fails with session-expired semantics after 8+ hours idle per API design §2.1 and tech stack §2

cases.title: Auth middleware refreshes last_activity_at on each request extending sliding inactivity window
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with last_activity_at at T0 in Postgres
Auth middleware integrated with identity-auth module and real DB
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Invoke auth middleware with valid session at T0 + 7 hours
Query auth_sessions and assert last_activity_at updated to T0 + 7h
Advance TestClock to T0 + 14 hours 30 minutes without further activity
Invoke auth middleware again and assert session still valid (8h from last refresh at T0 + 7h)
Advance TestClock to T0 + 15 hours 1 minute and invoke middleware; assert SessionExpired rejection
cases.expected: NFR-16 sliding window: each authenticated request refreshes last_activity_at; session expires 8 hours after last activity, not initial login per FR-02 and roles-permissions §1.4

cases.title: AuthSession transitions from valid to expired after inactivity threshold
preconditions: Valid AuthSession exists with lastActivityAt at T0 in Postgres
TestClock fixture controls current time
Auth middleware wired through identity-auth module
steps: Verify GET /api/v1/auth/me succeeds at T0 + 7h 59m with valid session cookie
Advance clock to T0 + 8h 1m without updating lastActivityAt
Call GET /api/v1/auth/me with same session cookie
Call GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with same expired session and assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
Call POST /api/v1/check-in with same expired session and valid payload
cases.expected: beforeState: session valid for protected actions at T0 + 7h 59m; afterState: session expired at T0 + 8h 1m with HTTP 401 SessionExpired on auth introspection, BR-15 preflight, and check-in submit per NFR-16 and BR-06

cases.title: POST /check-in with idle-expired session returns 401 SessionExpired error envelope
preconditions: Student session established then aged beyond 8-hour inactivity via TestClock
Active session with valid QR token and in-radius coordinates prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired wecheck_session cookie and valid check-in body per API design §6.2
Assert HTTP status 401
Assert response JSON contains errorCode SessionExpired, message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn, and requestId
cases.expected: HTTP 401 with standard error envelope per API design §10.2 and error-handling §4.1; SessionExpired blocks check-in until re-authentication

cases.title: GET /auth/me with idle-expired session returns 401 SessionExpired
preconditions: AuthSession row exists with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before TestClock
Session cookie value captured from prior login
steps: GET /api/v1/auth/me with expired wecheck_session cookie
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode SessionExpired
Assert response body contains no user profile fields
cases.expected: HTTP 401 SessionExpired on session introspection; expired session treated as invalid per roles-permissions §1.4 force re-login behavior

cases.title: POST /auth/login session.expiresAt reflects default 8-hour inactivity window from login time
preconditions: Active student account exists with valid credentials
System policy uses default 8-hour session inactivity per NFR-16
TestClock fixed at known T0
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email and password at T0
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response session.expiresAt equals T0 + 8 hours within acceptable clock skew (±1 minute)
Assert Set-Cookie wecheck_session issued with HttpOnly attribute
cases.expected: Login success envelope includes session.expiresAt aligned to 8-hour default inactivity target per API design §2.2 and NFR-16 measure

cases.title: Admin-configured 10-hour inactivity policy applied to newly issued AuthSession rows
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with system policy sessionInactivityHours set to 10 by TrainingOfficeAdmin
TestClock fixture at T0
Active student user exists
steps: PUT /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity with body { "inactivityHours": 10 } using Admin session
POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid student credentials at T0
Query auth_sessions for expires_at and assert T0 + 10 hours
Advance TestClock to T0 + 9h 59m and verify session still valid via GET /api/v1/auth/me
Advance TestClock to T0 + 10h 1m and verify GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401 SessionExpired
cases.expected: NFR-16 admin configurability within 4–12 hour range: 10-hour policy persisted and enforced on new sessions; expiry occurs after configured inactivity period

cases.title: Instructor denied PUT and GET /policy/session-inactivity — policy:write restricted to TrainingOfficeAdmin
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session established
Instructor lacks policy:write per roles-permissions §2.2
Default session inactivity policy is 8 hours
steps: PUT /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity with body { "inactivityHours": 6 } using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
GET /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
Verify system policy remains at default 8 hours
cases.expected: NFR-16 admin-only configurability enforced: Instructor cannot read or change session inactivity timeout; HTTP 403; default 8-hour target unchanged

cases.title: Session valid at 7h 59m idle and expired at 8h 1m idle — exact NFR-16 default boundary
preconditions: AuthSession with lastActivityAt at T0 in Postgres
TestClock fixture controls current time
Active session with valid QR token for check-in payload
steps: At T0 + 7h 59m POST /api/v1/check-in with valid session and payload; assert not SessionExpired (may fail on other rules but not 401 SessionExpired)
At T0 + 7h 59m GET /api/v1/auth/me; assert HTTP 200
At T0 + 8h 1m GET /api/v1/auth/me; assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
At T0 + 8h 1m POST /api/v1/check-in; assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
cases.expected: NFR-16 8-hour boundary: session remains usable just before threshold; SessionExpired enforced immediately after 8 hours of inactivity

cases.title: Admin PUT /policy/session-inactivity rejects inactivityHours below 4 and above 12
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session with policy:write
Default policy is 8 hours
steps: PUT /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity with body { "inactivityHours": 3 } and assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed
PUT /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity with body { "inactivityHours": 13 } and assert HTTP 422 ValidationFailed
Assert error details reference allowed range 4–12 hours per NFR-16 specification
GET /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity and confirm value remains 8
cases.expected: NFR-16 configurable range enforced: values outside 4–12 hour bounds rejected with validation error; policy unchanged

cases.title: Minimum 4-hour admin policy expires session after 4 hours inactivity
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with sessionInactivityHours policy set to 4 by Admin
Student AuthSession created at T0 after policy change
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Verify GET /api/v1/auth/me succeeds at T0 + 3h 59m
Advance TestClock to T0 + 4h 1m without activity
Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) and assert session-expired failure
POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session and assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
cases.expected: NFR-16 minimum configurable bound (4 hours) honored: session expires after 4 hours idle when policy set to minimum allowed value

cases.title: Expired session on check-in deep link blocks preflight and redirects to login with returnUrl
preconditions: Student wecheck_session cookie exists but server treats session as expired (lastActivityAt > 8h ago via TestClock)
Student navigates to /check-in?token=<token-id> from QR deep link
Mobile viewport (375px) per user flows §1
steps: Observe client preflight call to GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 401 SessionExpired
Verify GpsCaptureStep does not mount per BR-15 preflight gate
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding the check-in path and sessionExpired=1 query param
Verify login page displays session-expired alert with data-testid login-session-expired and message Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn
Confirm check-in success confirmation is not shown
cases.expected: NFR-16 UI enforcement per AC-02c, BR-15, and LoginForm session-expired handling: expired session blocks preflight before GPS step; login redirect preserves returnUrl with sessionExpired flag; session-expired alert visible; check-in blocked until re-authentication

cases.title: Protected instructor route redirects expired session to login per force re-login policy
preconditions: Instructor session cookie present but expired beyond 8-hour inactivity (TestClock)
Instructor sessions list route at /instructor/sessions or equivalent protected path
steps: Navigate directly to instructor sessions list URL with expired session cookie
Observe redirect to /login with returnUrl encoding the instructor path
Verify session management UI content is not rendered
Confirm no session list data visible without re-authentication
cases.expected: NFR-16 applies to all protected SPA routes per roles-permissions §1.4: expired session forces re-login; instructor UI blocked until fresh authentication

cases.title: Successful re-login after session expiry returns user to preserved check-in deep link
preconditions: Student session expired while on check-in flow; redirected to /login?returnUrl=/check-in?token=<token-id>&sessionExpired=1
Student has valid active account credentials
QR token still valid within 30-second window or fresh token available
steps: Verify login page shows session-expired alert with data-testid login-session-expired
Enter valid email and password on LoginForm after session-expired redirect
Submit login
Observe post-login navigation returns to /check-in?token=<token-id>
Verify new session cookie issued and check-in flow UI renders
cases.expected: NFR-16 expiry recovery path: session-expired alert shown on login; re-authentication establishes fresh session; returnUrl preserved per FR-02 and AC-02b; student can complete check-in after idle timeout

cases.title: Flow A session timeout gate: stale student session blocked; re-login required before Present check-in
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, instructor opened Active session, QR token available
Student authenticated earlier but AuthSession idle beyond 8 hours (R-08 mitigation scenario)
TestClock controls inactivity elapsed time
steps: Student GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with expired session; assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
Student POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session and valid coordinates; assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
Student POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials and returnUrl to check-in deep link
Student GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with fresh session; assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
Student POST /api/v1/check-in with fresh session and valid payload
Instructor GET /api/v1/sessions/:id/attendance and verify Present count incremented
cases.expected: NFR-16 enforced in Flow A workshop path: expired idle session blocks BR-15 preflight and check-in submit; re-authentication required; successful preflight and check-in only after fresh session — mitigates stolen credential remote proxy per risk R-08

cases.title: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with idle-expired session returns 401 SessionExpired
preconditions: Student AuthSession row exists with lastActivityAt more than 8 hours before TestClock
Active session with valid unexpired QR token exists
Enrolled student context matches token session
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with expired wecheck_session cookie
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode SessionExpired
Assert response message is Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn per error-handling §4.1
Assert no preflight success envelope with outcome Valid is returned
cases.expected: NFR-16 and BR-15: idle-expired session rejected at preflight gate with HTTP 401 SessionExpired before enrollment or GPS validation chain executes; client must not advance to gps_capture step

cases.title: POST /setup/first-admin session.expiresAt reflects default 8-hour inactivity window
preconditions: Empty database (User.count = 0) with needsSetup true
TestClock fixed at known T0
System policy uses default 8-hour session inactivity per NFR-16
steps: POST /api/v1/setup/first-admin with valid institutionalId, displayName, email, and password at T0
Assert HTTP status 201
Assert response session.expiresAt equals T0 + 8 hours within acceptable clock skew (±1 minute)
Assert Set-Cookie wecheck_session issued with HttpOnly attribute
cases.expected: AC-17 bootstrap path per acceptance matrix NFR-16 trace: first-admin session obeys same 8-hour default inactivity target as POST /auth/login per API design §2.0 and §2.2

cases.title: Maximum 12-hour admin policy expires session after 12 hours inactivity
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with sessionInactivityHours policy set to 12 by Admin via PUT /api/v1/policy/session-inactivity
Student AuthSession created at T0 after policy change
TestClock fixture controls current time
steps: Verify GET /api/v1/auth/me succeeds at T0 + 11h 59m
Advance TestClock to T0 + 12h 1m without activity
Invoke AuthService.requireUser(sessionId) and assert session-expired failure
POST /api/v1/check-in with expired session and assert HTTP 401 SessionExpired
cases.expected: NFR-16 maximum configurable bound (12 hours) honored: session expires after 12 hours idle when policy set to maximum allowed value per domain constants SESSION_INACTIVITY_MAX_HOURS
